Security Alert

Unusual Login Detected

We noticed a login to your Sentinel account from a new device or location. If this was you, no action is needed.

Date:

1 April 2026 at 14:23 UTC

IP Address:

203.0.113.42

Location:

Berlin, Germany

Device:

Chrome 124 on Windows 11

Status:

Successful login

If this wasn't you:

1. Change your password immediately
2. Review your recent account activity
3. Enable two-factor authentication if not already active
4. Contact our security team if you notice anything suspicious

 This Was Me (https://sentinel.example.com/login/confirm)

 Secure My Account (https://sentinel.example.com/account/secure)

For your protection, we may temporarily restrict account access if suspicious activity continues.
